name: @zknicker/tavern-openclaw-messenger
description: Tavern Messenger channel plugin for OpenClaw

channel.label: Tavern
channel.blurb: First-party Tavern chat channel for OpenClaw.

scripts.build: bun run --filter @tavern/sdk build && bun test src/*.test.js
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @tavern/sdk build && bun test src/*.test.js
